_pvsyst_report: Kebithigollewa 10MWac Fixed Tilt - Huawei 300KTL Astronergy 580W N, PVsyst V7.4.2, Sim date 11/11/23

orientations.name: Main
orientations._note: Single fixed-tilt plane. PVsyst: 8° tilt, 0° azimuth (South). 832 strings × 28 modules in series. use_measured_poa=true → wstn1_tilted_irradiance used directly; Perez transposition skipped when station data is available.

module._area_derivation: Astronergy datasheet: 2278 mm × 1134 mm = 2.5833 m²/module (cross-check: 60179 m² PVsyst total / 23296 = 2.583 m²)
module._efficiency_source: PVsyst loss diagram: 'efficiency at STC = 22.48%'. Datasheet: 22.5% for 580W. PVsyst value used.
module._gamma_p_source: Astronergy CHSM72N(DG)/F-HC-580 datasheet (confirmed): Temperature coefficient Pmpp = -0.29%/°C = -0.0029/°C. Previous estimate was -0.0030.
module._model: Astronergy CHSM72N(DG)/F-HC-580, TOPCon half-cut, 144 cells (6×24), 2278×1134×30 mm

inverter._curve_source: Digitised from SUN2000-330KTL-H1 datasheet efficiency curve at 1189 V. x-axis = % of max AC output per inverter (330 kW); converted to plant-level kW = x/100 × (32 inverters × 330 kW) = x/100 × 10560 kW. Peak η = 0.99015 at ~2322 kW plant load (22% load). η = 0.98866 at full load. 37 sample points.
inverter._ac_rating_note: Grid power limit from PVsyst = 10000 kWac (binding constraint). Inverter nominal = 9600 kWac (32 × 300 kW), max = 10560 kWac (32 × 330 kW).
inverter._dc_threshold_note: PVsyst loss diagram: 'Inverter Loss due to power threshold: 0.00%' → threshold = 0
inverter._flat_efficiency_note: Fallback if use_efficiency_curve=false. Derived: 1 − 1.45% inverter loss = 0.9855.
inverter._model: Huawei SUN2000-330KTL-H1, 32 units. 300 kWac nominal, 330 kWac max, ≥99.0% max efficiency, ≥98.8% European efficiency.

losses._soiling_note: 3% applied for Sri Lanka ground-mounted plant. PVsyst simulation did not include soiling — this correction represents real-world conditions. Typical range for Sri Lanka: 2–5%.
losses._lid_note: TOPCon technology — LID is negligible. Not in PVsyst simulation.
losses._module_quality_note: PVsyst parameter: -0.8% (gain, 0~+3% power sorting). Annual weighted: +0.75% gain in loss diagram. PVsyst sign: negative = gain.
losses._mismatch_note: PVsyst: module mismatch 2.0% at MPP + string mismatch 0.2% = 2.15% combined (loss diagram).
losses._dc_wiring_note: PVsyst: 1.5% at STC (global array resistance 1.4 mΩ). Annual weighted = 1.03% (loss diagram). STC value used uniformly; expect ~0.5% systematic overestimate.
losses._ac_wiring_note: Not in PVsyst loss diagram — no AC ohmic loss in this simulation.

iam._source: PVsyst report Page 3 — IAM loss factor: User defined profile

_thermal_model_note: PVsyst: Uc=20.0 W/m²K, Uv=0.0 W/m²K/m/s (no wind correction). 'open_rack_glass_glass' (SAPM a=-3.47, b=-0.0594, ΔT=3) is the closest pvlib match. Uv=0 means wind provides no cooling — pvlib will slightly underestimate cell temperature at high wind speeds.

station._units: Irradiance: W/m², temperatures: °C, wind speed: m/s
station._extra_keys: wstn1_temperature_panel1/2/3 (°C panel temps), wstn1_humidity (%), wstn1_wind_dir — available but not used in model

defaults._air_temp_note: PVsyst annual average T_Amb = 27.96°C (from monthly results table)

_validation_targets._source: PVsyst P50 values — soiling NOT included in PVsyst simulation. With 3% soiling applied in this model, expect ~2–3% lower annual output vs this target.

_tb_asset_note: KSP_Plant asset — use entityType=ASSET for telemetry queries
_tb_device_note: KSP_P341 device — use entityType=DEVICE for telemetry queries
_tb_extra_device_keys: p341_current_a/b/c (mA, >100k raw → ÷1000 = A), p341_Vab/Vbc/Vca (mV, >33M raw → ÷1000 = V, 33 kV grid connection)
_tb_wstn_note: KSP_WSTN1 weather station device. All telemetry keys prefixed wstn1_.
